refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Coordinate task scheduling and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to optimize operational parameters.
DP2: Integrated task management system for scheduling and coordination.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and reporting subsystem.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 (combined solution addressing all sub-FRs)

potential_sources: Interdependency between task scheduling and equipment control parameters.
Data flow between telemetry reporting and task management.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but designed with clear interfaces to minimize complexity.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable network connectivity for telemetry and task coordination.
Risk of performance degradation if control algorithms are not tuned properly.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure modular design of control and task management to allow independent updates and testing.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including control algorithms, task management, and telemetry reporting.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends real-time productivity and operational data to external monitoring systems.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task schedules and sends execution status updates.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and remote modules including Teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of productivity-related functions; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module contains physical actuation but limited direct productivity logic.
Teleoperation focuses on remote control, less on productivity optimization.
Safety Services primarily handle safety alerts, minimal productivity logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DPs within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports coherent ownership.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple DPs.
Risk of interface overload if external modules require frequent data exchange.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and maintain clear interfaces.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched with selected DPs, maintaining functional independence and traceability.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module could lead to diffusion if not managed.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary ownership boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational testing within NGHE Solution.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of productivity functions to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Plan for modular decomposition within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity.
Define clear interface contracts for Telemetry and Tasking to external modules.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meet the criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility. No immediate need to revise or zigzag.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Coordinate task scheduling and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

revise.why: Current artifacts satisfy requirements and constraints.

assumptions: Control algorithms can be tuned effectively.
open_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
Potential performance issues if algorithms are not optimized.
evidence_needed: Operational test data demonstrating productivity target achievement.
Telemetry logs confirming real-time reporting accuracy.
